case_title: VERONICA JANE FORBES VS. CALIFORNIA CHARTER BUS AND TOURS LLC

docket_entries.description: REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON MAR-08-2022 IN DEPT. 506 - PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF VERONICA JANE FORBES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CHARTER BUS AND TOURS LLC, REPRESENTED BY MATT BERGER, OWNER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. WINTESS ANTON AGNITSCH, BUS DRIVER FOR DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CHARTER BUS AND TOURS LLC, TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CHARTER BUS AND TOURS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MARCH 8, 2022)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORBES, VERONICA JANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CHARTER BUS AND TOURS LLC $5,853.50 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,003.50, PAYMENT VIA 2 CHECKS: 1)$500.00 PRINCIPAL + $150.00 COSTS TO VERONICA FORBES. 2)$5,353.50 PAYABLE JOINTLY TO VERONICA FORBES AND CALIFORNIA CASUALTY. DEFENDANT'S BUS DRIVER IS FOUND TO BE AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO MATTHEW BERGER, 4911 COLISEUM WAY, OAKLAND, CA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,853.50 FILED BY FORBES, VERONICA JANE AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CHARTER BUS AND TOURS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED FEB-07-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CHARTER BUS AND TOURS LLC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CHARTER BUS AND TOURS LLC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AT HEARING.
